scripts.build: npm run generate:sitemap && tsc && vite build && node scripts/prerender-seo-pages.mjs && node scripts/verify-prerender.mjs && node scripts/verify-sitemap.mjs && node scripts/verify-seo-content.mjs
scripts.build:dev: npm run generate:sitemap && VITE_API_URL=http://localhost:3001/dev VITE_PAYPAL_CLIENT_ID=AdMVsZO63epz-Fqg0O2Hh47QP1ATtUovxq7JUqbwU8iXEJIPKaFN7DG7iMOqJI1FpoiKak3jlkpVNeCV vite build && node scripts/prerender-seo-pages.mjs && node scripts/verify-prerender.mjs && node scripts/verify-sitemap.mjs && node scripts/verify-seo-content.mjs
scripts.build:prod: npm run generate:sitemap && VITE_TEMPLATE_VERSION=$(date +%s) VITE_API_URL=https://api.getquickresume.com VITE_GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID=639420865993-5j49j494dv0dr5paeddjpl18aq2latlb.apps.googleusercontent.com VITE_LINKEDIN_CLIENT_ID=78gy4pl3ps34f0 VITE_PAYPAL_CLIENT_ID=ARYOpApRtahgN477XBh-_CHK41wVvsb7a86G0ihTne-LWrzLym_z3hccyMfs1WLMat8_UpZcNf1XI0UA tsc && vite build && node scripts/prerender-seo-pages.mjs && node scripts/verify-prerender.mjs && node scripts/verify-sitemap.mjs && node scripts/verify-seo-content.mjs
scripts.postdeploy:seo-checklist:
node -e "console.log('
=== Manual post-deploy SEO (Search Console) ===
- URL Inspection: sample /resume/ and /resume-skills/ URLs (EN + ES)
- Sitemaps: confirm sitemap.xml lastmod and child sitemap URL counts
- Page indexing: export sample of Crawled-not-indexed URLs; check canonical + uniqueness
- Internal links: profession pages link to /resume-skills/* and /create (see ProfessionResumePage)
- Monitor Coverage, Page indexing, hreflang
')"
scripts.deploy:frontend: npm run test:api:ci && npm run generate:sitemap && npm run build:prod && npx serverless deploy --stage prod && npx serverless s3sync --stage prod && npm run invalidate:cloudfront
scripts.deploy:frontend:dev: npm run build:dev && serverless deploy --stage dev
scripts.invalidate:cloudfront: echo '🔄 Invalidating CloudFront cache...' && DIST_ID=$(aws cloudformation describe-stacks --stack-name getquickresume-frontend-prod --query 'Stacks[0].Outputs[?OutputKey==`CloudFrontDistributionId`].OutputValue' --output text) && echo "Distribution ID: $DIST_ID" && aws cloudfront create-invalidation --distribution-id $DIST_ID --paths '/*' && echo '✅ CloudFront invalidation created successfully'
scripts.generate:templates: npm run generate:thumbnails && npm run generate:manifest
scripts.deploy:api: npm run test:api:ci && cd api && serverless deploy --stage prod
